race.comment: Another progressive horse here who appeals in the form of KINGSBURY (6) who won dominantly on debut  at Pakenham, charging home to score by 2.25 lengths in fast time. He should only come on from that and tipping he measures right up to this grade and better. THAT'SMONEYBROTHER (11) has been right there in two runs back from a spell, beaten under a length in a decent race at Geelong last time out. Peaks now and will just need a good ride early from the wide gate. MONGOLIAN GOBI (7) resumes for his second campaign having shown good ability last time in. He draws nicely and should run a good race. ROGUE WARRIOR (10) resumes having gone to the paddock a winner here. He can run well fresh. FIRERATED (15) was okay fresh at Cranbourne and can improve.
